attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Chinese AI firm DeepSeek has unveiled its new flagship model, V4, which significantly improves upon its predecessor by handling much longer prompts due to an enhanced design.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Organizations are rapidly integrating AI technologies such as copilots and predictive systems into their operations, highlighting the necessity for a robust data infrastructure to maximize business value.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: The rise of large language models (LLMs), exemplified by ChatGPT, has transformed everyday applications of AI technology, making sophisticated text generation accessible to the general public.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Google DeepMind is collaborating with global consultancies to expedite AI implementation across various industries, aiming to leverage advanced AI capabilities for business enhancements.
